falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,150 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 lows invalidates the 78% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, proving this was not a similar bottoming structure but rather a continuation of downtrend or new breakdown

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme fear pricing contradicts the HOLD signal's implied stabilization; a true bottom_2024_aug analog would show VIX peaking and declining, not escalating into sustained panic

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further below -50 basis points (currently approx -15 to -25 bps range)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening inversion rather than normalization expected near an equity bottom signals worsening economic conditions, invalidating the bottom formation thesis and suggesting the 39 blowoff score underestimated systemic stress

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
